summary: Iteration 28: Step 3 Location Validation testing complete. All backend tests passed (7/7 = 100%). All frontend validation features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/establishments/me returns structured_address when present
Backend: PUT /api/establishments/me with structured_address saves CEP, city, neighborhood correctly
Backend: PUT /api/establishments/me without structured_address preserves existing address
Backend: PUT /api/establishments/me syncs flat city/neighborhood from structured_address
Backend: Clearing structured_address with empty values works correctly
Frontend: Step 3 (Confirmação de Localização) shows Cidade and Bairro fields separately
Frontend: With valid structured_address - button 'Próximo: Ver Anúncio' is GREEN and enabled
Frontend: With valid structured_address - no red error borders, no warning banner
Frontend: Without structured_address - button 'Próximo: Ver Anúncio' is DISABLED (grayed out, opacity 0.6)
Frontend: Without structured_address - Endereço/Cidade/Bairro fields have red border
Frontend: Without structured_address - error text 'Campo obrigatório. Por favor, complete seu perfil.' shown below each missing field
Frontend: Without structured_address - yellow warning banner visible: 'Complete seu endereço com CEP válido para publicar ofertas.'
Frontend: Clicking disabled button shows alert: 'Atenção - Você precisa completar seu endereço no perfil para publicar esta oferta.'
Frontend: 'Editar dados do perfil' button opens profile edit modal with CEP field
Frontend: Profile edit modal shows CEP field with 00000-000 placeholder
Frontend: ViaCEP auto-fill works - typing valid CEP (01001-000) fills Rua, Bairro, Cidade/UF
Frontend: 'CEP válido' indicator shown in green when CEP is valid
Frontend: After saving profile with valid CEP, Step 3 shows enabled button and no errors
critical_code_review_comments: offers.tsx: renderStep2() correctly implements profileComplete validation (lines 802-917)
offers.tsx: hasCep, hasCity, hasNeighborhood checks work correctly with structured_address
offers.tsx: profileFieldError style applies red border (#EF4444) to missing fields
offers.tsx: fieldErrorText shows 'Campo obrigatório' message below missing fields
offers.tsx: warningBanner shows yellow warning when profileComplete is false
offers.tsx: nextBtnDisabled style applies opacity 0.6 and gray background when disabled
offers.tsx: handleNextStep() shows alert when trying to proceed with incomplete profile
offers.tsx: openProfileEdit() correctly loads existing structured_address data
offers.tsx: handleProfileCEPChange() calls ViaCEP API and auto-fills address fields
offers.tsx: saveProfileEdit() sends structured_address to backend and refreshes data
server.py: Flat city/neighborhood fields are synced from structured_address
seed_data_creation: Used existing test establishment. Cleared structured_address via API to test invalid state, then restored with valid CEP 01001-000 (Praça da Sé, São Paulo).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 complete. Step 3 Location Validation feature fully tested. The establishment 'teste@estabelecimento.com' now has valid structured_address with CEP 01001-000 (Praça da Sé, São Paulo). All validation states (valid/invalid) work correctly: disabled button, red borders, error text, warning banner, alert on click, profile edit modal with ViaCEP auto-fill.

features_verified.step3_cidade_field: WORKING - Shows Cidade separately with validation
features_verified.step3_bairro_field: WORKING - Shows Bairro separately with validation
features_verified.step3_endereco_field: WORKING - Shows formatted address with validation
features_verified.valid_state_green_button: WORKING - Button is green and enabled when profile complete
features_verified.valid_state_no_errors: WORKING - No red borders, no error text, no warning banner
features_verified.invalid_state_disabled_button: WORKING - Button is grayed out with opacity 0.6
features_verified.invalid_state_red_borders: WORKING - Missing fields have red border (#EF4444)
features_verified.invalid_state_error_text: WORKING - 'Campo obrigatório' shown below missing fields
features_verified.invalid_state_warning_banner: WORKING - Yellow banner with warning message
features_verified.disabled_button_alert: WORKING - Alert shown when clicking disabled button
features_verified.viacep_autofill: WORKING - Auto-fills Rua, Bairro, Cidade/UF from CEP
features_verified.save_profile_enables_button: WORKING - After save, button becomes enabled
